item.title: 17th Industry Strategic Meeting Held in Madrid

item.title: Operation Compass Rose VI Strengthens Maritime Cooperation
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain— Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) successfully concluded Operation Compass Rose VI, its flagship multinational training engagement, April 20-22, 2026. This year, the engagem…

item.title: Combined Maritime Forces Maintains Operations During Middle East Conflict
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain – Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) has continued to deliver operational outputs despite the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, maintaining uninterrupted maritime security activ…

item.title: UK Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’Combined Task Force 151

item.title: Indian Navy-led CTF 154 conducts staff training aboard INS Surat

item.title: India Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’ CombinedTask Force 154
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain – The Indian Navy assumed command of Combined Task Force (CTF) 154, from the Italian Navy during a change of command ceremony, presided over by U.S. Navy Vice Adm. Curt Renshaw, com…

item.title: Jordan travel advice
item.description: FCDO travel advice for Jordan. Includes safety and security, insurance, entry requirements and legal differences.

item.title: UK candidate for the International Court of Justice election 2026: Professor Dapo Akande, election brochure
item.description: This election brochure for Professor Dapo Akande explains his experience and credentials as the UK candidate for election as a judge to the International Court of Justice for 2027 to 2036.

item.title: Democratic Republic of the Congo travel advice
item.description: FCDO travel advice for the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Includes safety and security, insurance, entry requirements and legal differences.

item.title: Safeguarding and protection from sexual exploitation and abuse and harassment (SEAH) in international work
item.description: Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) guidance on preventing and responding to sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment in international work.

item.title: UK strategy on protection from sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment in international work
item.description: This strategy sets out how the UK will prevent and respond to sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment linked to international work.

item.title: Arrested or in prison in Togo
item.description: This guide provides information about being arrested in Togo and what conditions are like in prison there.
